visuals.title: System Call Process Flow
visuals.description: Visual diagram for System Call Process Flow
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Operating System Operations</text>
  
  <!-- Kernel -->
  <rect x="160" y="80" width="100" height="60" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="110" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Kernel
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Process Management -->
  <rect x="50" y="170" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="195" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Process Management
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Memory Management -->
  <rect x="270" y="170" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="320" y="195" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Memory Management
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- File System -->
  <rect x="50" y="240" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="265" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    File System
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- I/O Management -->
  <rect x="270" y="240" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="320" y="265" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    I/O Management
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrows from Kernel to components -->
  <line x1="210" y1="140" x2="100" y2="170" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="210" y1="140" x2="320" y2="170" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="210" y1="140" x2="100" y2="240" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="210" y1="140" x2="320" y2="240" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Arrowheads -->
  <polygon points="100,170 95,165 95,175" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  <polygon points="320,170 325,165 325,175" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  <polygon points="100,240 95,235 95,245" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  <polygon points="320,240 325,235 325,245" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
</svg>
